item.name: Amulet of Arcane Absorption
entries: This ancient relic protects its wearer from harm, absorbing harmful magic directed at them.
{\b Arcane Redirection.} Whenever you would take damage from a magical effect or spell, you can use your reaction to take no damage instead, as the magic is absorbed by the Amulet

entries.name: Hidden Effect
entries: A character can discover this property with a successful {@check Arcana|25} check.

{\b Arcane Volatility.} Every point of damage absorbed by the amulet is stored as raw energy. If the wearer removes the amulet, or if it is forcefully removed, the stored energy lashes out in a powerful explosion. Every creature within a sphere centered on the amulet must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw. The radius of the sphere is equal to the damage stored (e.g., 50 damage = 50 ft. radius).
On a failed save, a creature takes {@damage force} damage equal to the total damage stored in the amulet, or half as much on a successful one. After this explosion, the stored damage returns to 0.
